alerts.title: Rivian Spinoff Raises $400M for Industrial Robots
alerts.description: The vendor will use the funds to scale deployment of Mind’s AI-powered robots in live manufacturing environments.

alerts.title: Scout AI Raises $100M to Build ‘AI Brain' for Autonomous Warfare
alerts.description: The fund raise comes as the White House pushes AI dominance across industries, including defense.

alerts.title: DeepSeek-V4 Could Change Global AI Model Race
alerts.description: The model maker released two versions of V4, both of which are open, cheap and use Huawei's AI chips for inference.

alerts.title: Cerebras is the hot new AI chipmaker. Here's Jim Cramer's advice on the stock
alerts.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said Cerebras has a compelling AI story and promising technology, but warned the chipmaker’s valuation has become difficult to justify.

alerts.title: LangSmith Engine closes the agent debugging loop automatically — but multi-model enterprises still need a neutral layer
alerts.description:
Enterprises building and deploying agents have a problem: it’s taking their engineers too long to find out that an agent made a mistake, and the loop has continued to perpetuate, especially without a human at every step.
